channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: SAGE — A Notion MCP Academic Co-Pilot for Filipino University Students
item.description: This is a submission for the Notion MCP Challenge What I Built SAGE — Student Agent for Guided Education — is an academic co-pilot built for Filipino university students. You connect your Notion...

item.title: Ritual Protocol: a key as an action, not an object
item.description: Ritual Protocol: a key as an action, not an object Every secret storage system is only as secure as the storage itself. Someone steals your password database — they steal everything. Someone...

item.title: Local-First Software Is Winning: A Developer Guide to Building Without the Cloud
item.description: I lost two hours of work last Tuesday because my internet went down for eleven minutes. Not because I was using some exotic cloud-dependent tool. I was editing a document in a mainstream SaaS...

item.title: JNBridgePro vs IKVM vs Javonet: Java/.NET Bridge Comparison (2026)
item.description: I've been deep in the Java/.NET integration space for years, and the one question that comes up more than anything: which bridge tool should I actually use? IKVM? JNBridgePro? Javonet? Something...

item.title: I Built an AI That Matches Lonely People with Therapy Pets — Here's What I Learned
item.description: Ever had a bad week and thought, "I just need to hug a dog right now"? You're not alone. Science agrees. And I built something about it. This post is about MyPetTherapist — an AI-powered platform...

item.title: 7 Mac Apps for Developers Preparing for Technical Interviews in 2026

item.title: A classic Zelda-style adventure, but a lot more cozy
item.description: The Legend of Zelda games are grand adventures, but they can also be very comforting, with quaint villages to explore and warm landscapes to take in. Under The Island takes that idea a step...

item.title: Here’s what Verge readers are buying during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: We have a pretty good understanding of which deals Verge readers will gravitate toward. After all, what products and services resonate with our audience — and the quality of the deal itself — are...

item.title: Your Cookie Banner Is Probably Breaking GDPR — Here's the 20-Point Audit to Find Out
item.description: You installed a cookie banner plugin, clicked through the setup, and moved on. That was six months ago. You just received an email from a user asking why your site set cookies before they clicked...

item.title: Non-native English is my unfair advantage as a tech blogger
item.description: Every article about "writing in English as a non-native speaker" seems to give the same advice. Use Grammarly. Read more books. Don't use a translator. Practice. That's fine, but it treats the...

item.title: How to Monitor Your WordPress wp-admin Login Page
item.description: WordPress powers over 40% of all websites on the internet. From personal blogs to enterprise storefronts, millions of site owners rely on the wp-admin dashboard every day. But here is the problem:...

item.title: Why OpenAI killed Sora
item.description: On Tuesday morning, everything was business as usual at OpenAI. By the end of the day, the company had announced that it would scrap its video-generation app, Sora, and reverse plans for video...

item.title: Oppo made the best foldable phone, again
item.description: There are always a few reasons people give for not buying a foldable phone. Some - price, battery life, camera quality - are mostly a matter of manufacturers balancing spec sheets to offset the...

item.title: Citrix NetScaler Under Active Recon for CVE-2026-3055 (CVSS 9.3) Memory Overread Bug
item.description: A recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway is witnessing active reconnaissance activity, according to Defused Cyber and watchTowr. The...

item.title: A woman’s uterus has been kept alive outside the body for the first time

item.title: CISA Adds CVE-2025-53521 to KEV After Active F5 BIG-IP APM Exploitation
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Friday added a critical security flaw impacting F5 BIG-IP Access Policy Manager (APM) to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities...

item.title: TA446 Deploys DarkSword iOS Exploit Kit in Targeted Spear-Phishing Campaign
item.description: Proofpoint has disclosed details of a targeted email campaign in which threat actors with ties to Russia are leveraging the recently disclosed DarkSword exploit kit to target iOS devices. The...

item.title: Bluetti’s Sora 500 solar panel is incredibly powerful for its size
item.description: We don't review many solar panels at The Verge, but the tech inside Bluetti's incredibly portable Sora 500 panel makes it worth a deeper look. The new N-Type panels made by Bluetti and others give...

item.title: Sony temporarily suspends memory card sales due to shortages
item.description: Sony has announced that as of March 27th, 2026, the company is no longer accepting orders for nearly all the products in its CFexpress and SD memory card lines. The list of affected memory...

item.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
item.description: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.

item.title: AI Research Is Getting Harder to Separate From Geopolitics
item.description: A policy change announced by NeurIPS, the world’s leading AI research conference, drew widespread backlash from Chinese researchers this week and then was quickly reversed.

item.title: Why SoftBank’s new $40B loan points to a 2026 OpenAI IPO
item.description: Wall Street giants JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs are extending a 12-month, unsecured loan to the Japanese conglomerate.

item.title: Insta360’s last-gen Link 2C is fantastic 4K webcam now that it’s 20 percent off
item.description: If you spend a lot of time presenting or chatting over video, you know how big a difference a decent webcam can make. Thankfully, if you’re looking to level up your setup at home or at work, the...

item.title: Friday Squid Blogging: Bioluminescent Bacteria in Squid
item.description: The Hawaiian bobtail squid has bioluminescent bacteria.

item.title: The White House has an app now, and Trump wants you to report people to ICE on it
item.description: A new official White House app on Android and iOS takes the content from the White House website and copies it into app format. A tweet announcing the app on Friday morning appeared alongside a...

item.title: Wait, the Trump phone might actually exist
item.description: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This week I think I've found an FCC listing for...

item.title: Memory chip giant SK hynix could help end ‘RAMmageddon’ with blockbuster US IPO
item.description: SK hynix’s potential U.S. listing could raise $10-$14 billion to help it build more capacity, encourage others to follow, and end the 'RAMmageddon' memory shortage.

item.title: Apple Sends Lock Screen Alerts to Outdated iPhones Over Active Web-Based Exploits
item.description: Apple is now sending Lock Screen notifications to iPhones and iPads running older versions of iOS and iPadOS to alert users of web-based attacks and urge them to install the update. The...
